entry.title: New: RES25-139 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF 60 TICKETS VALUED AT $1,860 TO THE CITY FROM THE WALT DISNEY COMPANY FOR EMPLOYEES OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU AND THEIR GUESTS TO ATTEND A SCREENING OF THE LIVE ACTION, “LILO AND STICH” FEATURE FILM, WHICH INCLUDES A DRINK AND SERVING OF POPCORN, AT THE WARD THEATER COMPLEX ON MAY 21, 2025.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
